overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character moves from a covered walkway through a busy intersection and along sidewalks lined with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with medical clinics

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway, following a pedestrian in a red top

notable_agents.action: woman in red crop top and shorts walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure creating shade over the walkway
large multi-story building with blue neon HOTEL signage visible in the distance
illuminated teal signage for medical services on the right wall
glowing advertisement screens displaying various products and media

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway with a green-tinted floor, passing medical clinics and digital billboards on the right. The area is shaded by an overhead concrete structure, with a hotel building visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open intersection

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into bright direct sunlight, causing a significant lighting shift from shaded to sunlit

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway into the open street, approaching a crosswalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street ahead, indicating a warm climate setting
clear blue sky visible after exiting the covered area

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into bright sunlight, revealing palm trees and a clear blue sky. The hotel building becomes more prominent as the camera approaches the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street with other pedestrians
vehicles including a yellow taxi and black sedan pass through the intersection perpendicular to the crossing direction

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians while traffic moves perpendicular

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated at the intersection corner
blue neon signage reading PAWN SHOP on the building facade
wide white-striped pedestrian crossing spanning the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection under bright sunlight, navigating around other pedestrians while cars including a yellow taxi drive through. Traffic lights and a pawn shop sign mark the corners of the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with neon advertisements and elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: turning onto the sidewalk alongside the busy street, entering the shadow of tall buildings
passing under an elevated highway or monorail structure that casts shadows over the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and observing the towering neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive blue hair and yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building wrapped with large vertical red neon signs depicting lips and the word SINS
multi-level highway or monorail structure running above the street with vehicles visible on it
modern street lighting poles with orange glowing fixtures

segments.scene_description: Walking along a downtown sidewalk flanked by towering buildings, the character passes under an elevated highway structure. The SINS building with its prominent red neon lip signage dominates the right side, while traffic flows along the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and towering WNS building ahead

events.description: entering a more open plaza area with trees and benches, moving away from the dense street corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the massive WNS tower, passing people sitting on benches

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with large WNS signage and digital displays near the top, dominating the skyline
mature trees planted in the plaza providing shade and greenery
green public seating where pedestrians are resting
piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open plaza area with benches, trees, and scattered pedestrians. The massive WNS tower rises prominently in the distance ahead, while the elevated highway structure remains visible overhead. The environment feels more spacious compared to the dense street corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, industrial corridor into the bright, open expanse of a sun-drenched city intersection. It begins within a covered urban walkway featuring a green-tinted floor, passing by medical clinics and digital billboards under a heavy concrete overhead. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up and shifts from the dim interior into brilliant sunlight, revealing towering palm trees and a clear blue sky. The camera then advances toward a prominent hotel building before transitioning into a busy crossing filled with pedestrians and passing vehicles, including a yellow taxi. The movement finally settles in the heart of the intersection, marked by traffic lights and a pawn shop sign under the midday glare.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, shadowed urban corridor into a wide, open city plaza. It begins by tracking a character along a downtown sidewalk flanked by towering buildings, passing beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway. As the camera moves forward, the view is dominated by the glowing red neon lip signage of the SINS building on the right while traffic flows steadily along the adjacent multi-lane street. The scene then expands as the character leaves the narrow street corridor and enters a spacious plaza filled with benches, trees, and scattered pedestrians. Finally, the perspective opens up completely to reveal the massive WNS tower rising prominently in the distance under the lingering shadow of the overhead highway.
